message:
🐛 Fix search results clicking doing nothing for catalog cards and non-sidebar dashboards (#2018)

- Dashboard.tsx: handle ?addCard=true URL param to open add-card modal
  (was only handled in DashboardPage.tsx but not the main dashboard)
- SearchDropdown: use navigate with replace when already on the same
  path so ?addCard=true param is picked up by the useEffect
- SearchDropdown: append ?customizeSidebar=true for dashboard category
  results so clicking a custom dashboard opens the sidebar customizer

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
